Welcome to Mina's webpage!

Workshop for Motivational Interviewing

February 6, 2021

I took the workshop for Motivational Interviewing by Prof. Sung-Man Shin. The lecture addressed ‘motivation’ based on the self-determination theory by Richard Ryan &amp; Edward Deci. It was interesting that the theory defines an intrinsic motivation as a combination of autonomy, belonging, competence, and a sense of goal. After learning these theoretical backgrounds, we could practice motivation interviewing in the practice session. I tried the role of a counselor, and I practiced the OARS techniques (Open questions, Affirming, Reflection, and Summarizing). I look forward to applying what I’ve learned in this workshop at the 1:1 counseling session that I’m going to do in the On-campus counseling center :)

Data Science Bootcamp (Math for Data Science)

January 11, 2021

From January 04 to January 11, I’ve taken the “Math for Data Science” course of the Data Science Bootcamp held by SNU Graduate School of Data Science. I could learn more about Linear Algebra, and I believe this would help me to better understand &amp; conduct machine learning, deep learning, and other analyses! Thanks to Prof. Min-hwan Oh for the wonderful lectures :)

Working at the on-campus counseling center

January 2, 2021

Starting this January, I’m working at the on-campus counseling center at Seoul National University, “Center for Campus Life &amp; Culture”. As a graduate student majoring in clinical psychology, this would be a great opportunity to experience real clinical settings, and apply what I learned in lectures so far. From January to June, I’ll be doing the intake interview every week :) I’m also going conduct some 1:1 counseling sessions!

E-poster at SOBP 2020

April 30, 2020

2020 Society of Biological Psychiatry (SOBP) Annual Meeting might have been my first presentation abroad, but it has been canceled due to the COVID-19. If you have the SOBP membership, please checkout the ePoster Gallery! The title is “Neural Correlates of Goal-Directed Control in Video Game Addiction and Alcohol Use Disorder.”

Won the SNU Graduate Scholarship for Basic Science Research

March 2, 2020

I won my first scholarship as a graduate student! Due to COVID-19, ceremony wasn’t held this year. All, please stay safe &amp; healthy!
